20.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
20.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

20.gl: to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)
20.kj: abide, accomplish, [idiom] be clearer, confirm, continue, decree, [idiom] be dim, endure, [idiom] enemy, enjoin, get up, make good, help, hold, (help to) lift up (again), make, [id

20.gl: a man in general (singly or collectively)
20.kj: another, [idiom] (blood-) thirsty, certain, chap(-man); divers, fellow, [idiom] in the flower of their age, husband, (certain, mortal) man, people, person, servant, some ([idiom] o
20.dv: from H605 (אָנַשׁ); properly, a mortal (and thus differing from the more dignified H120 (אָדָם)); hence,

20.gl: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively)
20.kj: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

20.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
20.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

20.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
20.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.
